title: rubus × rupivagus
intro: Rubus × rupivagus, also known as the raspberry-blackberry hybrid, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the Himalayan blackberry (Rubus armeniacus). The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Rubus × rupivagus include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide a range of health benefits.
